description_long: This is a modern city bus with a rectangular, elongated body and a predominantly white exterior accented by black and gray details. The bus features large, rectangular windows along both sides, providing ample visibility for passengers. The front displays a wide windshield, destination signage in Japanese, and dual headlights, while the rear has a similar window and taillight arrangement. The sides are adorned with advertising graphics, including the phrase 'TECHNICAL YIELD' and various logos. The bus has two visible passenger doors, one at the front and one at the rear, both marked with yellow highlights. The roof is flat with black panels, likely for ventilation or air conditioning units.
description: A modern, white city bus with large side windows, advertising graphics, and two passenger doors, featuring black and gray accents and a flat roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide windshield, destination sign in Japanese, headlights, and front passenger door.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the bus, large windows, advertising graphics, and both passenger doors.
description_view_2: Rear view with a large window, taillights, and visible advertising, but no passenger doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with large windows, advertising, and no visible passenger doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: The bus has a series of large, rectangular windows evenly spaced along both sides, separated by vertical pillars, with a consistent height and width, and no significant variation in design.
attribute_bus_manufacturer_logo: No distinct manufacturer logo is visible; the exterior features advertising graphics and text but no clear bus brand logo.
